name: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources
description: The product does not properly restrict access to dynamically-managed code resources such as variables, objects, functions, or executable statements. Attackers can exploit dynamic code features to execute unauthorized code or alter program execution in unexpected ways.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data that flows to a TRANSFORM[dynamic_code] node (eval, reflection, deserialization, dynamic dispatch) that can modify or execute code resources without a CONTROL[input_validation] node restricting what code resources can be accessed
